{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged palm
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Empty Palm]] created a [[Forged palm]] bigger than his body.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
